Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing in Aria Operations for Logs

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The password of account {subject.account.name} is bruteforced in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Attempts to bruteforce the password of account {subject.account.name} in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.
